introSection: Wonder Woman is a steel 4th dimension roller coaster located at Six Flags Mexico in Mexico City, Mexico. It was manufactured by S&S Worldwide and opened in 2018.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Wonder Woman is a 4D Free Spin from S&S, the same model as the Joker rides across various Six Flags parks, Batman The Ride at Six Flags Fiesta Texas and Arashi at Nagashima Spa Land. The ride is themed around DC superhero Wonder Woman.

fullText:
Wonder Woman is a steel 4th dimension roller coaster located at Six Flags Mexico in Mexico City, Mexico. It was manufactured by S&S Worldwide and opened in 2018.

Wonder Woman is a 4D Free Spin from S&S, the same model as the Joker rides across various Six Flags parks, Batman The Ride at Six Flags Fiesta Texas and Arashi at Nagashima Spa Land. The ride is themed around DC superhero Wonder Woman.
